mnemonics.title: Deque Operations
mnemonics.content: **F**ront and **R**ear, **I**nsert and **D**elete -> **FRID**. Remember you can do it all from both ends: Insert Front, Insert Rear, Delete Front, Delete Rear.

mnemonics.title: Priority Queue Complexity
mnemonics.content: **U**nsorted -> **U**norganized -> Insert is **U**nbelievably fast (O(1)), but finding the best to Delete is a **U**niversally slow (O(n)) task. **S**orted -> **S**tructured -> Inserting in the right **S**pot is Slow (O(n)), but Deleting the best is **S**imple and Swift (O(1)).
